summary.description: Return memory-card counts for one identity.
summary.sql: select count(*) as total_cards, sum(case when archived_at is null then 1 else 0 end) as active_cards, sum(case when archived_at is null and kind = 'preference' then 1 else 0 end) as preferences, sum(case when archived_at is null and review_on <= date(:now) then 1 else 0 end) as due_for_review from memory_cards where identity_id = :identityId

kind_breakdown.description: Return active card counts by kind for one identity.
kind_breakdown.sql: select kind, count(*) as count from memory_cards where identity_id = :identityId and archived_at is null group by kind order by case kind when 'fact' then 1 when 'preference' then 2 when 'project' then 3 when 'reminder' then 4 else 99 end

review_queue.description: Return active cards due for review, optionally filtered by kind.
review_queue.sql: select id, captured_on, kind, title, details, confidence, tags_json, review_on from memory_cards where identity_id = :identityId and archived_at is null and review_on <= date(:now) and (:kind is null or :kind = '' or kind = :kind) order by review_on asc, confidence asc, id desc

search_cards.description: Search active memory cards by text and optional tag.
search_cards.sql: select id, captured_on, kind, title, details, confidence, tags_json, review_on from memory_cards where identity_id = :identityId and archived_at is null and (:query is null or :query = '' or lower(title || ' ' || coalesce(details, '')) like '%' || lower(:query) || '%') and (:tag is null or :tag = '' or exists (select 1 from json_each(memory_cards.tags_json) where value = :tag)) order by captured_on desc, id desc

recent_cards.description: Return recently captured active memory cards.
recent_cards.sql: select id, captured_on, kind, title, details, confidence, tags_json, review_on from memory_cards where identity_id = :identityId and archived_at is null order by captured_on desc, id desc limit 10
